name: Sourdough Strawberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the all-purpose flour and salt.
2. Add the bread flour, butter, baking powder, nutmeg, sugar, and egg to the flour mixture. Mix until well combined.
3. Gradually add the sourdough starter (or heavy cream) and mix until a loose dough forms.
4. Grease a 9-inch round or 8-inch square pan with butter.
5. Press the dough into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
6. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
7. Bake for 18-22 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Let cool in the pan for a few minutes before slicing horizontally.
9. For the fruit topping, hull and chop 2 pints of strawberries. Mix with 1/4 cup sugar.
10. Spread the strawberry mixture evenly over one layer of the cooled cake.
11. Whip the heavy cream, amaretto, and remaining sugar until stiff peaks form.
12. Spread half of the whipped cream on top of the fruit layer.
13. Arrange sliced strawberries on top of the whipped cream.
14. Spread the remaining whipped cream over the berries.
15. Place the second layer of cake on top and spread with the rest of the whipped cream.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature.
